summary_text: As of 2026-04-17 15:03 UTC, the recent Canada earthquake dataset contains 546 events from the current rolling window. The deepest event reached 16.29 km at 11 km NNW of Saint-Pascal, QC/11 km NNO de Saint-Pascal, QC. The most recent listed event was M-0.02 at 11 km SSE of La Malbaie, QC/11 km SSE de La Malbaie, QC at 2026-04-17T03:37:58.000Z.
